title: Luciano Charlita De Freitas
author: @worldbank
text:
Luciano Charlita De Freitas

Senior Specialist in Digital Transformation and Artificial Intelligence

This page in:

English

Portuguese

English

Portuguese

Luciano holds a PhD in Economics-Development Policy and is a Senior Specialist in Digital Transformation and Artificial Intelligence at the World Bank, based in Brasília, where he manages and coordinates investment projects and analytical products related to digital transformation and Artificial Intelligence. Luciano has 25 years of experience in the sector, having worked in several countries across the Americas, Africa, Europe, and Asia.
